body_txt: Cuteness is often associated with smallness , but sometimes characters or creatures can look cute despite, or even partly because of, how big they are. This is the essence of the cute giant . Of course, cuteness is not so much about size as about various physical traits that are hard to pin down. Nevertheless, the association of cuteness with a giant does end up seeming contradictory. Compare/contrast with Gentle Giant , but remember, some giants can be cute but not gentle , or gentle but not cute . See also Canis Major and Mega Neko , examples of which tend to double as this for obvious reasons . A Giant Woman can often be this as well.
